rationale.native_pdfs: PyMuPDF provides direct, lossless text extraction — no OCR overhead
rationale.scanned_pdfs: pymupdf selected for highest composite score (quality + speed + reliability)
rationale.parser: pymupdf selected for best structure preservation
rationale.tradeoffs: PaddleOCR offers best Hindi/Sanskrit quality but slower; Tesseract is fastest for English
rationale.maintenance: PyMuPDF is mature and well-maintained; OCRmyPDF wraps Tesseract with PDF-aware workflow

hardware_requirements.cpu_only: PyMuPDF, Tesseract, OCRmyPDF — no GPU needed
hardware_requirements.gpu_optional: PaddleOCR benefits from GPU but works on CPU
hardware_requirements.memory_minimum: 4GB RAM for small PDFs, 16GB for large (>100MB)
